title: Version 11 production publish readiness, smoke-test alignment, and live URL update

requirements.summary: Add lightweight production-visible build identification and ensure production connectivity errors are actionable.
acceptanceCriteria: A production deployment is triggered for Version 11 and completes successfully (no generic "Deployment error").
The production frontend loads in a browser without showing a backend connectivity error card (e.g., "Canister Id not resolved").

file_operations.description: Display a small, non-intrusive "Version 11" label in the app chrome (e.g., footer/header) to confirm the live app is updated; keep all user-facing text in English. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Refine the connection error presentation text to clearly distinguish "backend not reachable" vs "configuration/canister resolution" and to guide production troubleshooting without exposing secrets; preserve existing UI composition constraints. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Update the checklist to include verifying the visible Version 11 label and reiterate the stop-condition for any backend connectivity error card in production.

requirements.summary: Ensure the production smoke-test checklist behavior is met, including Daily Entry actions being enabled and Save navigating to the saved record details reliably.
acceptanceCriteria: On the production URL, the Daily Entry page finishes loading and the three action buttons are clickable (not disabled/grayed out).
Clear Form clears entered inputs and resets the Balance Date field.
Copy for Vendor shows the required validation toast when Balance Date is missing, and successfully copies formatted text when Balance Date is set.
Save Record successfully saves a record and it appears in History and opens in Record Details.

file_operations.description: After a successful Save Record, navigate directly to Record Details for the just-saved record using the known Balance Date timestamp as the route param; ensure Clear Form still resets inputs and Balance Date, and Copy for Vendor validation toasts remain unchanged. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Change "View Details" navigation to use a stable record identifier (the record timestamp string) rather than the array index so production navigation remains correct after new saves/refetches. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Update record lookup to resolve the route param as a timestamp and find the matching record by timestamp instead of treating the param as an index; keep loading/error behavior intact. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Confirm routing remains correctly wired for /history/$recordId with the updated semantics (recordId now representing a timestamp string) and that navigation links still function. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Adjust the Save Record verification step to explicitly confirm the app opens the saved record in Record Details after saving, matching the updated timestamp-based navigation.

requirements.summary: Keep the documented production URL current after Version 11 publish.
acceptanceCriteria: frontend/LIVE_URL.md contains the correct current production URL and no longer points to an outdated deployment.
The URL in frontend/LIVE_URL.md is reachable and loads the production app.

file_operations.description: Update the live production URL to the current post-publish URL (only if it changed) and ensure the page still provides correct, English usage guidance for end users.
